metadata.title: Sultan Alhaj Ahmad | Marketing Manager CV
metadata.description: Marketing Manager with over five years of experience across healthcare, retail, food and beverage, sports, real estate, brand strategy, content, and performance marketing in Saudi Arabia and Jordan.

highlights: Creating culturally engaging Arabic content tailored to Jordanian and Saudi markets
Using performance data and audience insights across Meta, Google, and Snapchat

points: Developed and managed Garden Art’s brand identity and market positioning.
Led marketing strategy, content planning, and the company’s digital presence across Instagram, LinkedIn, Google Business Profile, website content, and corporate outreach channels.
Created Arabic and English marketing content tailored to the Saudi market, including social media posts, captions, campaigns, brochures, company profiles, and corporate presentations.
Supported sales activities through client outreach, lead generation, prospect research, email marketing, WhatsApp campaigns, follow-ups, and proposal preparation.
Managed email campaigns and maintained updated prospect databases to support new business opportunities.
Coordinated with management on business-development activities, client communication, project submissions, and corporate presentations.
Prepared professional sales and marketing materials for tenders, client meetings, company introductions, and partnership opportunities.
Strengthened Garden Art’s corporate image through consistent branding, premium visual direction, and professional marketing documentation.
Supported client acquisition across villas, residential compounds, corporate buildings, healthcare facilities, hospitality businesses, government-related facilities, contractors, and developers.
Worked closely with internal teams to align marketing materials with sales objectives, company positioning, and client requirements.
Managed healthcare marketing accounts including Care Clinic, SKN Clinic, HAMC, U Medical Complex, Avant Clinics, and physician accounts.
Developed digital strategies across SEO, Google Maps optimization, paid advertising, and social media for services including laser treatments, plastic surgery, dermatology, and internal medicine.
Created Arabic and English campaigns promoting medical procedures, services, consultations, and devices.
Directed creative production for promotional posts, influencer videos, social media highlights, and online consultation campaigns.
Coordinated designers, media buyers, web developers, content creators, and other production stakeholders.
Led marketing and branding operations for Quattro Village.
Developed and executed campaigns in collaboration with Reflect, Ittihad Bank, and Red Bull, including cashback activations, on-ground events, branding materials, and tournaments.
Built and managed monthly social media content calendars, carousel campaigns, and Friday activations designed to increase awareness and footfall.
Managed Padel Me Club’s marketing activities, including tournament planning, influencer partnerships, gear-shop promotions, booking campaigns, and membership promotions.
Developed video-content strategies and event-recap Reels, and directed photography, videography, and brand-identity production.
Managed campaigns targeting off-peak booking hours, families, and membership acquisition.
Collaborated with management on sponsorship proposals, pricing models, and performance reviews.
Helped deliver a major padel tournament in collaboration with Ahli Bank, Zain, Careem, and more than 11 sponsors, contributing to its position as one of Jordan’s largest padel tournaments.
Developed and managed cross-platform advertising campaigns for pharmaceutical and medical-import businesses.
Managed SEO-focused websites and Amazon and Noon product listings.
Produced email newsletters and e-commerce content tailored to B2B and B2C audiences.
Managed social media strategy and aligned campaigns with defined performance indicators and estimated KPIs.

skillGroups.label: Paid Media
items: Meta, Snapchat, Google, and TikTok Advertising

skillGroups.label: Content & Social
items: Bilingual Content Creation — Jordanian Arabic, Saudi Arabic, and English
Social Media Management — Instagram, Snapchat, and Facebook

tools: AI-Assisted Content Creation — Text, Visuals, and Motion
selectedValue: Digital Marketing and Social Media Management
